headline: Airlines Earnings Should Take Off. The Stocks May Get Left Behind.
summary: Delta Air Lines will kick off second-quarter earnings season for major airlines on July 10, and things have been looking up for the group

headline: PNC Financial to Lift Dividend by 18% After 2026 Fed Stress Test
summary: PNC plans an 18% dividend hike after passing the Fed's 2026 stress test, backed by strong capital buffers.

headline: How Citigroup's Stress Test Success Strengthens Shareholder Returns
summary: C's 2026 Fed stress test success boosts capital flexibility, supporting higher dividend payments, a $30B buyback and long-term shareholder returns.

raw.headline: How Citigroup's Stress Test Success Strengthens Shareholder Returns

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Citigroup, Raises Price Target to $158
summary: Truist Securities  analyst John McDonald   maintains Citigroup (NYSE:C) with a Buy and raises the price target from $147 to $158.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Citigroup, Raises Price Target to $158

headline: Capital Deterioration Projected In Stress Test Falls To Lowest Level In 7 Years
summary: Projected losses dropped for the second year in a row in this year's Federal Reserve stress test compared to the year prior, to the lowest level in at least seven years. Read more here.
